response.justification: Bogdan has deep full-stack engineering experience across diverse domains and technologies, with clear technical craftsmanship and open-source contributions, but lacks explicit AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform strategy leadership, or demonstrable AI-driven innovation at scale required for a Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy.
strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience across multiple domains and languages
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership via tools and platforms
Proven ability to build and ship complex systems with measurable impact
concerns: No clear evidence of AI/ML product development or deployment at scale
Lacks documented experience in cloud AI platform strategy or customer advisory roles
No advanced degree in AI or related field, and minimal mention of ML frameworks
